title: National Indigenous Peoples Day Celebration
description: Annual celebration of Indigenous cultures, traditions, and contributions at Sagamok Anishnawbek. Join us for a day of music, food, cultural demonstrations, and community fellowship.

title: National Indigenous Peoples Day — Espanola
description: Espanola's celebration of National Indigenous Peoples Day with cultural activities, traditional food, and live performances in the town centre.

title: Sagamok Annual Powwow
description: Annual traditional powwow at Sagamok Anishnawbek featuring grand entry, dancing, drumming, vendors, and a feast. All are welcome to attend this celebration of Anishinaabe culture.

title: Serpent River First Nation Powwow
description: Annual powwow hosted by Serpent River First Nation with traditional dancing, drum groups, arts and crafts vendors, and traditional food.
location: Serpent River First Nation Powwow Grounds, Spanish

title: Sagamok Community Feast
description: Spring community feast at Sagamok Anishnawbek bringing together families for a traditional meal, storytelling, and community connection.

title: North Shore Language Workshop
description: Anishinaabemowin language workshop for community members of all ages. Learn everyday phrases, songs, and stories in the Ojibwe language.

title: Elliot Lake National Indigenous Peoples Day
description: Elliot Lake's celebration of National Indigenous Peoples Day with community activities, cultural presentations, and traditional food.

title: Sagamok Summer Youth Camp
description: Week-long summer youth camp at Sagamok Anishnawbek focused on cultural teachings, land-based learning, traditional crafts, and outdoor activities.

title: Sagamok Fall Harvest Gathering
description: Annual fall harvest gathering celebrating the season's bounty with traditional food preparation, community feast, and Thanksgiving teachings.

title: Serpent River Trading Post Summer Art Show
description: Summer art show at the Serpent River Trading Post featuring Indigenous artists from across the North Shore with live demonstrations, workshops, and art for sale.
location: Serpent River Trading Post, 479 Highway 17, Spanish

title: Water Ceremony — Sagamok
description: Annual water ceremony honouring the sacredness of water and our responsibility to protect it. Led by community Knowledge Keepers and water walkers.

title: Sagamok Street Party
description: Annual Sagamok street party with live music, food vendors, games, and family fun for the whole community.
